---
title: Biscuits au chocolat, aux amandes et au caramel

categories:
  - Biscuit
  - Chocolat
---

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-toolbar">
<a href="../ajouter_recette/?yaml=%2Frecettes%2Fdesserts%2Fbiscuit-au-caramel-chocolat-amande.yaml" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">✏️ Modifier cette recette</a>
<div class="recipe-toolbar-actions">
<button id="recipe-cart-toggle" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success btn-sm">Ajouter au panier</button>
<button id="recipe-reading-mode" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">🍳 Mode cuisine</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" onclick="window.print()">🖨️ Imprimer</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" onclick="navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href)">🔗 Copier le lien</button>
</div>
</div>
<div class="recipe-facts-grid"><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Source</span><strong>Ricardo</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Se congèle</span><strong>Oui</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps préparation</span><strong>40 min</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps cuisson</span><strong>8 min</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps réfrigération</span><strong>125 min</strong></div></div>
```

```{=html}
<script id="recipe-cart-data" type="application/json">{"id":"/recettes/desserts/biscuit-au-caramel-chocolat-amande.qmd","title":"Biscuits au chocolat, aux amandes et au caramel","url":"/recettes/desserts/biscuit-au-caramel-chocolat-amande.qmd","portions_base":20,"portions_target":20,"ingredients":[{"nom":"Farine tout usage non blanchie","uni":"ml","qte":443.787,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Cacao","uni":"g","qte":50,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Bicarbonate de soude","uni":"ml","qte":2.5,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Sel","uni":"ml","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Beurre non salé, fondu et tempéré","uni":"g","qte":170,"rangee":"Produits laitiers et oeufs"},{"nom":"Cassonade","uni":"ml","qte":177.7778,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Sucre","uni":"ml","qte":125.448,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Beurre d’amandes","uni":"ml","qte":45,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Œufs","uni":"unité","qte":2,"rangee":"Produits laitiers et oeufs"},{"nom":"Chocolat au lait, en pastilles ou haché grossièrement","uni":"ml","qte":165.0485,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Amandes, grillées et hachées","uni":"g","qte":85,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Caramels mous du commerce","uni":"unité","qte":20,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Chocolat restant","uni":"g","qte":80,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Amandes restantes","uni":"g","qte":45,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Fleur de sel","uni":"au goût","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"}]}</script>
<script src="/includes/recipe-cart.js"></script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-servings-control"><label for="servings-input" class="form-label mb-1">Ajuster les portions</label><div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-2"><input id="servings-input" class="form-control form-control-sm" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="20" style="max-width: 110px;"><button id="servings-reset" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" type="button">Réinitialiser</button><span class="text-muted small">Base: 20</span></div><div class="recipe-measure-mode"><span class="form-label mb-1 d-block">Affichage des quantités</span><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Mode de mesure"><button id="measure-mode-volume" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="volume">Volume</button><button id="measure-mode-mass" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="mass">Masse</button></div><div class="recipe-measure-submodes mt-2"><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Format volume"><button id="volume-unit-kitchen" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">Cuillères / tasse</button><button id="volume-unit-ml" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">mL</button></div><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm ms-2" role="group" aria-label="Format masse"><button id="mass-unit-g" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">g</button><button id="mass-unit-lbs" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">lbs</button></div></div><span class="text-muted small d-block mt-1">Les quantités converties sont affichées dans une couleur différente.</span></div></div>
```

```{=html}
<section class="recipe-nutrition-section">
<h2>Valeurs nutritives</h2>
<div class="recipe-nutrition-block"><div class="recipe-nutrition-cards"><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Calories</span><strong>316 kcal</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Protéines</span><strong>5,3 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Glucides</span><strong>39,3 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Lipides</span><strong>16,4 g</strong></div></div><details class="recipe-nutrition-details"><summary class="recipe-nutrition-toggle">Afficher le détail complet</summary><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Estimations basées sur les ingrédients saisis. Portions de base: 20.</p><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Sources nutrition (ingrédients calculés): cnf_2015: 14.</p><table class="recipe-nutrition-table table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Nutriment</th><th>Par recette</th><th>Par portion</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><th scope="row">Calories</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="6310.8" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">6311 kcal</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="6310.8" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">316 kcal</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Protéines</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="105.0635" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">105,1 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="105.0635" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">5,3 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Lipides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="328.966" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">329 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="328.966" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">16,4 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Gras saturés</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="151.8783" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">151,9 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="151.8783" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">7,6 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Glucides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="786.3915" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">786,4 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="786.3915" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">39,3 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sucres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="530.868" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">530,9 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="530.868" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">26,5 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fibres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="51.89" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">51,9 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="51.89" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">2,6 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sodium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="2097.38" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">2097 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="2097.38" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">105 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Potassium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="3510.43" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">3510 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="3510.43" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">176 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Calcium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1172.79" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">1173 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1172.79" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">59 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fer</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="33.3413" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">33,3 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="33.3413" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">1,7 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Magnésium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="990.01" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">990 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="990.01" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">50 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Zinc</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="19.1105" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">19,1 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="19.1105" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">1 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sélénium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="227.576" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">227,6 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="227.576" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">11,4 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine C</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1.215" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">1,2 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1.215" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,1 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine B12</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="4.065" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">4,1 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="4.065" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,2 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine A (EAR)</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1550.7" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">1551 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1550.7" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">78 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine D</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="3.95" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">3,9 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="3.95" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,2 ug</td></tr></tbody></table><details class="recipe-nutrition-missing"><summary>Ingrédients non comptabilisés (1)</summary><ul><li><code>Fleur de sel</code> (unite_non_calculable)</li></ul></details></details></div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const key='recipe_reading_mode';
let wakeLock=null;
const apply=(on)=>{document.body.classList.toggle('reading-mode', on);};
const requestWake=async()=>{try{if('wakeLock' in navigator){wakeLock=await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen');}}catch(e){}};
const releaseWake=async()=>{try{if(wakeLock){await wakeLock.release(); wakeLock=null;}}catch(e){}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>{
const btn=document.getElementById('recipe-reading-mode');
const saved=localStorage.getItem(key)==='1'; apply(saved); if(saved) requestWake();
if(!btn) return;
const refresh=()=>{btn.classList.toggle('active', document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'));}; refresh();
btn.addEventListener('click', async()=>{const next=!document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'); apply(next); localStorage.setItem(key, next?'1':'0'); refresh(); if(next){await requestWake();} else {await releaseWake();}});
});
})();</script>
```

## Ingrédients

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-grocery-actions">
<button id="copy-grocery-list" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">📋 Générer la liste d'épicerie</button>
<button id="reset-recipe-checks" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">↺ Réinitialiser les cases</button>
<span id="grocery-copy-feedback" class="text-muted small"></span>
</div>
```

### Pâte

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Farine tout usage non blanchie" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="225" data-base-volume-ml="443.786982248521" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte ingredient-approx" data-base="443.786982248521">443.79</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Farine tout usage non blanchie</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Cacao" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="50" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="50">50</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Cacao</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Bicarbonate de soude" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="2.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2.5">2.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Bicarbonate de soude</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="1.217" data-base-volume-ml="1" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Beurre non salé, fondu et tempéré" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="170" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="170">170</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre non salé, fondu et tempéré</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Cassonade" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="160" data-base-volume-ml="177.777777777778" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte ingredient-approx" data-base="177.777777777778">177.78</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Cassonade</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sucre" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="105" data-base-volume-ml="125.448028673835" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte ingredient-approx" data-base="125.448028673835">125.45</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sucre</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Beurre d’amandes" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="45" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="45">45</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre d’amandes</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Œufs" data-ingredient-unit="unité" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">unité</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Œufs</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Chocolat au lait, en pastilles ou haché grossièrement" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="170" data-base-volume-ml="165.04854368932" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte ingredient-approx" data-base="165.04854368932">165.05</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Chocolat au lait, en pastilles ou haché grossièrement</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Amandes, grillées et hachées" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="85" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="85">85</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Amandes, grillées et hachées</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

### Formation

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Caramels mous du commerce" data-ingredient-unit="unité" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="20">20</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">unité</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Caramels mous du commerce</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Chocolat restant" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="80" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="80">80</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Chocolat restant</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Amandes restantes" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="45" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="45">45</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Amandes restantes</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

### Cuisson

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Fleur de sel" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Fleur de sel</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

## Équipements

### Pâte

- Bol
- Cuillère
- Batteur électrique
- Spatule

### Formation

- Cuillère à crème glacée
- Plaque de cuisson

### Cuisson

- Four
- Papier parchemin
- Plaque de cuisson

## Préparation

### Pâte

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Farine tout usage non blanchie" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="225" data-base-volume-ml="443.786982248521" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte ingredient-approx" data-base="443.786982248521">443.79</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Farine tout usage non blanchie</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Cacao" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="50" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="50">50</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Cacao</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Bicarbonate de soude" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="2.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2.5">2.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Bicarbonate de soude</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="1.217" data-base-volume-ml="1" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Mélanger la farine, le cacao, le bicarbonate et le sel dans un bol.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Beurre non salé, fondu et tempéré" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="170" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="170">170</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre non salé, fondu et tempéré</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Cassonade" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="160" data-base-volume-ml="177.777777777778" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte ingredient-approx" data-base="177.777777777778">177.78</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Cassonade</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sucre" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="105" data-base-volume-ml="125.448028673835" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte ingredient-approx" data-base="125.448028673835">125.45</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sucre</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Beurre d’amandes" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="45" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="45">45</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre d’amandes</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Mélanger le beurre fondu, la cassonade, le sucre et le beurre d’amandes au batteur électrique.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Œufs" data-ingredient-unit="unité" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">unité</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Œufs</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Chocolat au lait, en pastilles ou haché grossièrement" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="170" data-base-volume-ml="165.04854368932" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte ingredient-approx" data-base="165.04854368932">165.05</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Chocolat au lait, en pastilles ou haché grossièrement</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Amandes, grillées et hachées" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="85" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="85">85</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Amandes, grillées et hachées</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Ajouter les œufs, un à la fois, puis incorporer les ingrédients secs, 170 g de chocolat et 85 g d'amandes à basse vitesse.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

### Formation

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Former des boules de pâte à l’aide d’une cuillère à crème glacée de 45 ml et réfrigérer 5 à 10 minutes.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="600">⏱️ 10 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Caramels mous du commerce" data-ingredient-unit="unité" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="20">20</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">unité</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Caramels mous du commerce</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Insérer un caramel au centre de chaque boule et refermer la pâte.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Chocolat restant" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="80" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="80">80</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Chocolat restant</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Amandes restantes" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="45" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="45">45</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Amandes restantes</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Ajouter le reste du chocolat et des amandes sur les boules de pâte. Réfrigérer 2 heures ou congeler.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="7200">⏱️ 2 h</button></div></div></article>
</div>
```

### Cuisson

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Préchauffer le four à 190 °C et tapisser deux plaques de cuisson de papier parchemin. Répartir 6 à 8 biscuits par plaque.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Fleur de sel" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Fleur de sel</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Cuire au four 8 à 10 minutes jusqu’à ce que les biscuits soient cuits à l’extérieur mais encore mous au centre. Parsemer de fleur de sel.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="600">⏱️ 10 min</button></div></div></article>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){const input=document.getElementById('servings-input');const reset=document.getElementById('servings-reset');const btnVolume=document.getElementById('measure-mode-volume');const btnMass=document.getElementById('measure-mode-mass');const btnVolKitchen=document.getElementById('volume-unit-kitchen');const btnVolMl=document.getElementById('volume-unit-ml');const btnMassG=document.getElementById('mass-unit-g');const btnMassLbs=document.getElementById('mass-unit-lbs');const hasScaler=!!input;const base=20;const modeKey='recipe_measure_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const volumeUnitKey='recipe_volume_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const massUnitKey='recipe_mass_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;let mode=(localStorage.getItem(modeKey)==='mass')?'mass':'volume';let volumeUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(volumeUnitKey)==='ml')?'ml':'kitchen';let massUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(massUnitKey)==='lbs')?'lbs':'g';const format=(n)=>{const r=Math.round(n*100)/100; return (Math.abs(r-Math.round(r))<1e-9)?String(Math.round(r)):String(r).replace('.',',');};const normalize=(u)=>String(u||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim();const massFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'g':1,'gramme':1,'grammes':1,'gram':1,'grams':1,'kg':1000,'kilogramme':1000,'kilogrammes':1000,'lb':453.59237,'lbs':453.59237,'oz':28.34952,'once':28.34952,'onces':28.34952}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const volumeFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'ml':1,'millilitre':1,'millilitres':1,'l':1000,'litre':1000,'litres':1000,'t':250,'tasse':250,'tasses':250,'c a soupe':15,'cuillere a soupe':15,'cuilleres a soupe':15,'c a table':15,'c s':15,'c.s.':15,'c a the':5,'cuillere a the':5,'cuilleres a the':5,'c t':5,'c.t.':5}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const isKitchenUnit=(u)=>{const n=normalize(u); return n==='tasse'||n==='t'||n==='c a soupe'||n==='cuillere a soupe'||n==='cuilleres a soupe'||n==='c a table'||n==='c s'||n==='c.s.'||n==='c a the'||n==='cuillere a the'||n==='cuilleres a the'||n==='c t'||n==='c.t.';};const chooseKitchenUnit=(volumeMl,explicit)=>{if(isKitchenUnit(explicit)) return explicit; if(!Number.isFinite(volumeMl)) return 'c. à thé'; if(volumeMl>=125) return 'tasse'; if(volumeMl>=7.5) return 'c. à soupe'; return 'c. à thé';};const chooseImperialMassUnit=(massG,explicit)=>{const e=normalize(explicit); if(e==='once'||e==='onces'||e==='oz') return 'onces'; if(e==='lb'||e==='lbs') return 'lbs'; if(!Number.isFinite(massG)) return 'lbs'; return massG<453.59237?'onces':'lbs';};const setDerived=(label,qNode,uNode,isDerived)=>{if(qNode) qNode.classList.toggle('ingredient-approx',!!isDerived);};const updateIngredientForMode=(li,ratio)=>{const qNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-qte'); const uNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-uni'); const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); if(!qNode||!label) return false; const baseMass=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseMassG||''); const baseVolume=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseVolumeMl||''); const explicitMass=li.dataset.explicitMass==='1'; const explicitVolume=li.dataset.explicitVolume==='1'; const explicitUnitMass=li.dataset.explicitUnitMass||'g'; const explicitUnitVolume=li.dataset.explicitUnitVolume||'ml'; let qty=NaN; let unit=''; let derived=false; if(mode==='mass'&&Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?chooseImperialMassUnit(baseMass*ratio,explicitUnitMass):'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!explicitMass;} else if(mode==='volume'&&Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!explicitVolume;} else if(Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!explicitVolume;} else if(Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?chooseImperialMassUnit(baseMass*ratio,explicitUnitMass):'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!explicitMass;} else {li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated'); return false;} qNode.textContent=format(qty); if(uNode){uNode.textContent=unit;} li.setAttribute('data-ingredient-unit', unit); li.setAttribute('data-live-updated','1'); setDerived(label,qNode,uNode,derived); return true;};const applyModeButtons=()=>{if(btnVolume) btnVolume.classList.toggle('active', mode==='volume'); if(btnMass) btnMass.classList.toggle('active', mode==='mass'); if(btnVolKitchen) btnVolKitchen.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='kitchen'); if(btnVolMl) btnVolMl.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='ml'); if(btnMassG) btnMassG.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='g'); if(btnMassLbs) btnMassLbs.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='lbs');};const update=()=>{const current=hasScaler?parseFloat(input.value):base;const ratio=(hasScaler&&Number.isFinite(current)&&current>0)?(current/base):1;document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-ingredient').forEach((li)=>{if(!updateIngredientForMode(li,ratio)){li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated');}});document.querySelectorAll('.ingredient-qte[data-base]').forEach((el)=>{if(el.closest('.recipe-ingredient[data-live-updated="1"]')) return;const b=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base'));if(Number.isFinite(b)){el.textContent=format(b*ratio);} });document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-total[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal*ratio;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-per-portion[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal/base;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});};if(input){input.addEventListener('input', update);} if(reset&&input){reset.addEventListener('click', ()=>{input.value=String(base); update();});}if(btnVolume){btnVolume.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='volume'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'volume'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMass){btnMass.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='mass'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'mass'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolKitchen){btnVolKitchen.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='kitchen'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'kitchen'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolMl){btnVolMl.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='ml'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'ml'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassG){btnMassG.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='g'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'g'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassLbs){btnMassLbs.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='lbs'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'lbs'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}applyModeButtons();update();})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id="recipe-timer-dock" class="recipe-timer-dock d-none"><strong>Minuteur</strong> <span id="recipe-timer-label"></span> <span id="recipe-timer-remaining"></span> <button id="recipe-timer-stop" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light" type="button">Arrêter</button></div>
<script>(function(){
let timer=null, target=0, audioCtx=null, alarmInterval=null, alarmTimeout=null;
const pad=(n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
const fmt=(s)=>{const h=Math.floor(s/3600), m=Math.floor((s%3600)/60), sec=s%60; return h>0?`${h}:${pad(m)}:${pad(sec)}`:`${m}:${pad(sec)}`;};
const ensureAudio=async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext; if(!Ctx) return null; if(!audioCtx) audioCtx=new Ctx(); if(audioCtx.state==='suspended'){try{await audioCtx.resume();}catch(e){}} return audioCtx;};
const stopAlarm=()=>{if(alarmInterval){clearInterval(alarmInterval); alarmInterval=null;} if(alarmTimeout){clearTimeout(alarmTimeout); alarmTimeout=null;}};
const playBeep=(ctx,freq)=>{const t=ctx.currentTime+0.01; const osc=ctx.createOscillator(); const gain=ctx.createGain(); osc.type='sawtooth'; osc.frequency.value=freq; gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001,t); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.42,t+0.015); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.19); osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination); osc.start(t); osc.stop(t+0.2);};
const startAlarm=async()=>{const ctx=await ensureAudio(); if(!ctx) return; stopAlarm(); const notes=[1760,1480,2093,1760,2349,1760]; let i=0; const ring=()=>{playBeep(ctx,notes[i%notes.length]); i+=1;}; ring(); alarmInterval=setInterval(ring,250); alarmTimeout=setTimeout(stopAlarm,15000);};
const dock=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-dock'); const rem=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-remaining'); const lab=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-label'); const stop=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-stop');
const hide=()=>{if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} stopAlarm(); if(dock) dock.classList.add('d-none');};
document.addEventListener('click',async(e)=>{const b=e.target.closest('.recipe-timer-btn'); if(!b) return; const secs=parseInt(b.dataset.seconds||'0',10); if(!secs||secs<1) return; await ensureAudio(); stopAlarm(); if(timer) clearInterval(timer); target=Date.now()+secs*1000; if(lab) lab.textContent=b.textContent.replace('⏱️','').trim(); if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); timer=setInterval(()=>{const left=Math.max(0, Math.round((target-Date.now())/1000)); if(rem) rem.textContent=fmt(left); if(left<=0){if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} if(rem) rem.textContent='Terminé!'; if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); startAlarm();}},250);});
if(stop) stop.addEventListener('click', hide);
})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const pageKey='recipe_check_state:'+window.location.pathname;
const save=()=>{const state={}; document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{state[i]=cb.checked?1:0;}); localStorage.setItem(pageKey, JSON.stringify(state));};
const load=()=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(pageKey)||'{}'); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{cb.checked=!!s[i];});}catch(e){}};
const reset=()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.checked=false); save();};
const textFromLi=(li)=>{const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); return label?label.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():li.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();};
const copyGroceries=async()=>{const items=[...document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-grocery-list .recipe-ingredient')].filter(li=>!(li.querySelector('.recipe-ingredient-check')||{}).checked).map(textFromLi).filter(Boolean); const txt=items.length?items.map(x=>'- '+x).join('\n'):'(Aucun ingrédient restant)'; const fb=document.getElementById('grocery-copy-feedback'); try{if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){await navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);} else {window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt);} if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste copiée.';}catch(e){window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt); if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste prête à copier.';}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{load(); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.addEventListener('change',save)); const c=document.getElementById('copy-grocery-list'); if(c) c.addEventListener('click',copyGroceries); const r=document.getElementById('reset-recipe-checks'); if(r) r.addEventListener('click',reset);});
})();</script>
```

## Notes

_4 commentaire(s) · Alexandre Parent: 0 · Élodie Bourgeois: 0_

- Il est possible d’ajouter tout le chocolat et les amandes dès le début, mais en garder pour le dessus rend les biscuits plus jolis.
- Repos de 2 heures au réfrigérateur évite que les biscuits s’étalent trop.
- La pâte peut reposer jusqu’à 12 heures pour meilleure absorption des liquides.
- Se conserve 3 jours à température ambiante ou 3 mois au congélateur.
